name: GIGABYTE X870E AORUS ELITE WIFI7 ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C (DP1.4 Alt mode) - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: GIGABYTE X870E AORUS ELITE WIFI7 ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Premium AM5 ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 7, dual USB4, and extensive M.2 support for high-end builds.
